executives.name: Aart de Geus
executives.background: Dr. de Geus is the co-founder and Executive Chair of Synopsys, Inc. He has served as Synopsys' CEO or co-CEO from 1994 to 2023.

tenure_dates.title: Co-Founder, Executive Chair, Former CEO, President, Senior Vice President

executives.name: Ajei Gopal
executives.background: Ajei Gopal is the President and CEO of ANSYS, Inc. and serves as an independent member of the SAP Supervisory Board.

executives.name: Bruce Chizen
executives.background: Former CEO of Adobe Systems Incorporated.

executives.name: Mercedes Johnson
executives.background: Mercedes Johnson has been a director since 2014. She was formerly the Senior Vice President and CFO of Avago Technologies Limited and CFO of Lam Research Corporation.
